summary: ABL Pulse - A wellness assessment application with admin dashboard for viewing user assessments (Name, Date, Score, WhatsApp, Email). Backend includes assessment and wellness report functionality.
architectural_notes: Admin dashboard with footer navigation for direct access
Backend folders contain assessment and wellness report related structures

new_feature_requests.summary: Admin Dashboard Data Viewer table showing user assessments with Name, Date, Score, WhatsApp, Email
Create comprehensive documentation explaining the backend folder structure related to Assessment and Wellness Reports, including the purpose and function of each folder and file
Document the data models used for Assessment and Wellness Reports, including SectionId, SectionScores, MedicalHistory, UserAnswers, SolutionTip, and CompleteWellnessReport types
Document available backend functions and API endpoints for wellness reports, including storage operations, ID generation, and data retrieval methods
Create a visual representation or structured outline showing how the backend components interact to generate and store wellness reports
